title: One Last Breath (reprise)
lyrics: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Down to my last breath, my last time, my last mission, oh I'm down to my last breath Oh, I'm down on my luck at life I'm down to this one last breath Hate me now, yeah, hate me for the rest of your disaster of a life Hate me for the things that I did to you If it makes it easier to see me fall Never would've treated you the way you made me out to hell Yeah, I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last breath One last thought, one last life, one last moment to tell you I'm never ever being here again I'm down to this last thought of you and all I'll ever be Yeah, yeah, oh, oh, now you hate me more Is it gonna get worse? So you try to ignore the things that got us here in the first place And you look at me like a waste of space I'm just wasting your space and time All the packages and all the lines and everything I read to you to make you think you wanted me as yours Well, guess what? I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath One last breath, yeah, I'm just down, down, down, down to one last breath of you One last thought, I'm down, down, down, down to one One single line on her as a year I'll see you in your different perspective of life and death, reincarnation Why you fight me now? I'm down to one last breath I'm down to one last hell One last breath of me in my mental jail Yeah, I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath for me Yeah, I'm down, down to one last breath Oh, baby, yeah, there's no way you can fix us here You're gone and doomed, you're gone and doomed, yeah There's no way you can fix us, baby, we're just gone and doomed Our life has become a toxic non-healing mess of fabrication of lies, lies, lies As you go give up somewhere else and I cry and die Cause I'm down, down, down, down to my last breath for you

lyricsSegments.text: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Down to my last breath, my last time, my last mission, oh
I'm down to my last breath
Oh, I'm down on my luck at life
I'm down to this one last breath
Hate me now, yeah, hate me for the rest of your disaster of a life
Hate me for the things that I did to you
If it makes it easier to see me fall
Never would've treated you the way you made me out to hell
Yeah, I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last breath
One last thought, one last life, one last moment to tell you
I'm never ever being here again
I'm down to this last thought of you and all I'll ever be
Yeah, yeah, oh, oh, now you hate me more
Is it gonna get worse?
So you try to ignore the things that got us here in the first place
And you look at me like a waste of space
I'm just wasting your space and time
All the packages and all the lines and everything I read to you to make you think you wanted me as yours
Well, guess what? I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath
One last breath, yeah, I'm just down, down, down, down to one last breath of you
One last thought, I'm down, down, down, down to one
One single line on her as a year
I'll see you in your different perspective of life and death, reincarnation
Why you fight me now?
I'm down to one last breath
I'm down to one last hell
One last breath of me in my mental jail
Yeah, I'm down, down, down, down to one last breath for me
Yeah, I'm down, down to one last breath
Oh, baby, yeah, there's no way you can fix us here
You're gone and doomed, you're gone and doomed, yeah
There's no way you can fix us, baby, we're just gone and doomed
Our life has become a toxic non-healing mess of fabrication of lies, lies, lies
As you go give up somewhere else and I cry and die
Cause I'm down, down, down, down to my last breath for you
